creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
With the latest release of devel/ros, this port has been split into four parts by its authors (devel/ros itself and three new parts). Therefore, repocopy:
- devel/ros-documentation
- devel/ros-rx
- devel/ros_comm

While here, rename:
- devel/common_msgs to devel/ros-common_msgs
- math/geometry to math/ros-geometry
so that all ROS-related ports start with 'ros'
